title: NP-LITE embedded / edge boundary

must.text: Ed25519 sign/verify on-device or in companion; no truncated sigs
Canonical/CBOR payload maps back to JSON test vectors
Outbox queues ops when partitioned; flush is idempotent; never SETTLED offline
Device run-states (idle/busy/fault) are not Exchange state
No full uvicorn/node as the default embedded binary

should.text: Manifest declares lite.tier + canonical novapanda-c1 + offline_queue
Physical meter summary in deliverable/evidence (NP-PHYS), not CORE id

anti_patterns: Skip verify because RTT is high
Claim SETTLED while confirm is only in Outbox
ROS2 topic names as protocol state enums
